Create file governance/validators/validate_contours_registry.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED = {"id", "name", "director", "curator", "roles", "algorithm", "horizontal_outbound"}
EXPECTED_ALGORITHM = ["analyst_proposal", "auditor_precheck", "worker_execution", "auditor_postcheck"]


def validate(path="governance/contours/contours_registry.json"):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    contours = data.get("contours")
    if not isinstance(contours, list) or not contours:
        return ["contours list missing"]
    seen = set()
    for item in contours:
        missing = sorted(REQUIRED - set(item))
        if missing:
            errors.append(f"{item.get('id','UNKNOWN')}: missing {missing}")
        if item.get("id") in seen:
            errors.append(f"duplicate contour id {item.get('id')}")
        seen.add(item.get("id"))
        if item.get("algorithm") != EXPECTED_ALGORITHM:
            errors.append(f"{item.get('id')}: invalid contour algorithm")
        if item.get("horizontal_outbound") != "auditor_to_analyst_only":
            errors.append(f"{item.get('id')}: invalid horizontal outbound policy")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS contours_registry")
